summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend testing of EdilControl (Italian construction-company financial dashboard). 13 pytest backend tests (100% pass) covering all endpoints listed in the request, plus end-to-end Playwright UI testing of all 7 navigation pages and key interactions. App is fully functional, in Italian, no console errors.

issues: Margine '9200 €' for Bagno Studio Notarile is missing the Italian thousand-separator dot ('9.200 €') – likely a small bug in the formatter for 4-digit values. Other amounts use correct Italian formatting (180.000 €, 320.000 €). Cosmetic only.

action_items: Optional: review thousand-separator formatting for 4-digit margin values (9200 € -> 9.200 €) on Cantieri table to be fully consistent with Italian locale.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 460 lines — still under 700 line threshold but consider splitting into routers (cantieri, movimenti, dashboard, seed) as features grow.
All MongoDB responses correctly exclude _id via projection {'_id': 0} — no leakage observed.
Pydantic models with ConfigDict(extra='ignore') used consistently, UUID-based ids generated server-side (good).
Break-even endpoint correctly returns HTTP 400 when margine_unitario <= 0 (validated).
AI Advisor endpoint is intentionally a placeholder (abilitato:false) per user request — confirmed working.
Seed endpoint is properly idempotent via count_documents check.
All UI pages have data-testid attributes; navigation uses kebab-case test ids consistently.
seed_data_creation: Demo data was seeded automatically by /api/seed-demo (4 cantieri, 26 movimenti, 7 costi fissi). Idempotent fixture in test suite handles re-runs.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_edilcontrol_api.py covers all 13 critical paths. Frontend uses kebab-case data-testids: nav-{dashboard,cantieri,movimenti,break-even,ebitda,costi-fissi,ai-advisor}, page containers ending in -page, action buttons like cantiere-new-btn, movimento-new-btn, costo-new-btn, be-calc-btn. Demo data persists across test runs (seed is idempotent). MOCKED API: /api/ai-advisor/status returns hardcoded {abilitato:false,...} placeholder — by design until user enables LLM integration.
